_comment: KB-2 HBP 2022 — Urology. Merged from 5 batches. 140 procedures.

packages.package_name: Palliative Care Approach to managing Haematuria in advanced cancer patients- Endoscopic/Surgical/Radiological, Radiotherpay interventions

preauth.label: Clinical notes with planned line of treatment

claim.label: Discharge summary with detail treatment and details of interventions and procedure done

aliases: Palliative surgery for blood in urine

additional_information.vintage_note: Cross-specialty package — listed under Medical Oncology (MO), Radiation Oncology (MR), Surgical Oncology (SC), and Urology (SU) in HBP_2022_Package_Master1.xlsx. Absent from HBP-2022.pdf entirely; no tier rates available. Excel col I (non-authoritative) shows 20000. Excel col X (Enhancement=Yes) contradicts col Y (Med or Surg=Surgical): billing_unit=one_time retained per extractor logic (Surgical early-return). Excel data quality issue — verify against NHA TMS before use.

source_refs.rates_inr: PM001A absent from HBP-2022.pdf — no tier rates available. Excel col I (non-authoritative per schema) = 20000. Verify manually.
